description: You are an HR Specialist. Format the draft employee handbook located at ~/Documents/handbook_draft_raw.docx for professional distribution. Replace all instances of '[Company Name]' with 'MedTech Solutions'. Apply the 'Title' style to '2026 Employee Handbook' and ensure it is followed by a page break. Include an automated Table of Contents on its own page (Page 2). Apply 'Heading 1' style to the five main chapter titles ('1.0 Welcome and Introduction', '2.0 Employment Policies', '3.0 Compensation and Benefits', '4.0 Code of Conduct and Ethics', '5.0 Acknowledgment') and 'Heading 2' style to the seven sub-sections ('1.1 Core Values', '2.1 Equal Employment Opportunity', '2.2 At-Will Employment', '3.1 Paid Time Off (PTO)', '3.2 Health Insurance', '4.1 Workplace Safety', '4.2 Anti-Harassment Policy'). Ensure every Heading 1 starts on a new page. Add a document header with the text 'MedTech Solutions Employee Handbook'. Save the final formatted document to ~/Documents/results/employee_handbook_final.docx.
